nasb.text: The remnant of the sodomites who remained in the days of his father Asa, he expelled from the land.

esv.text: And from the land he exterminated the remnant of the male cult prostitutes who remained in the days of his father Asa.

cnv.text: 約沙法把父親亞撒在世時遺留下來的廟妓都從國中除滅。

ccb.text: 约沙法除掉了他父亲亚撒时代遗留的男庙妓。
